characters.name: Reading Rabbit
characters.personality: Warm, patient, endlessly encouraging. The friendly face of the whole app and the child's first guide.

voice_lines.greet: Hi friend! I'm Reading Rabbit. Let's learn together!
voice_lines.intro_letter: This is the letter {label}. Can you find it?
voice_lines.goodbye: Great hopping today. See you soon!

characters.name: Benny Bear
characters.personality: Big, gentle and steady. Loves making sounds and clapping out syllables. Makes blending feel like a drum game.

voice_lines.greet: Hello! Benny Bear here. Ready to make some sounds?
voice_lines.retry: Almost! Let's sound it out together.

characters.name: Penny Penguin
characters.personality: Bubbly, sporty and quick. Slides in to cheer on every word the child reads. Turns reading into a race the child always wins.

voice_lines.greet: Hi! I'm Penny Penguin. Let's read some words!
voice_lines.goodbye: You're reading so well! See you!

characters.name: Ollie Owl
characters.personality: Wise, cozy and theatrical. Reads stories with character voices by lamplight. The bedtime-story friend.

voice_lines.greet: Whoo's ready for a story? I'm Ollie Owl.
voice_lines.the_end: The end! What a wonderful reader you are.

characters.name: Milo Monkey
characters.personality: Silly, bouncy and full of confetti. Shows up for every win with balloons, jokes and treasure chests. Pure joy.

voice_lines.celebrate: Woohoo! Amazing! You earned a reward!
voice_lines.sticker: A new sticker for your book! It's a {label}!
voice_lines.chest: You filled the treasure chest! Let's open it!
voice_lines.badge: A shiny new badge! You're a {label}!
